footer.footer_mono: SCM software for distributors and warehousing.

home.hero_title:
ERP-grade systems,
as easy as using WhatsApp.
Without the months-long implementation drama.
home.hero_subtitle: The conversational SCM platform built for mid-market distributors and warehouse operators across Southeast Asia. Ask it anything. Tell it what you're doing. It handles the rest — in real time, from your phone.
home.cap_procurement_desc: Automate PO matching and digital GRN. Track vendor performance and streamline dock scheduling.
home.cap_warehouse_desc: Intelligent putaway, wave picking, and real-time inventory visibility across multiple zones.
home.cap_distribution_desc: Route optimization, proof of delivery, and seamless integration with 3PL partners.
home.cap_analytics_desc: Real-time visibility into stock aging, fill rates, and labor productivity.
home.brand_statement: The truth is on the floor.
home.brand_desc: Legacy systems trap you in screens. Sanak connects the physical reality of your operations directly to your system of record in real-time.
home.voice_demo_update: Stock updated to 450 ctn in Zone A.
home.vp_1_d: Know exactly what you have, where it is, and when it expires — without calling anyone or waiting for a report. Query by voice or text, get answers in seconds.
home.vp_2_d: Your warehouse staff shouldn't need a laptop or training to update a system. SANAK works the way they already communicate — speak naturally, get the right input captured instantly.
home.vp_3_d: Every receiving, every outbound, every stock adjustment is logged with who did it, when, and why. No more guessing when something doesn't add up.
home.problem_desc: Mid-market distributors in Malaysia and Singapore are running real businesses — moving real inventory, coordinating real teams — on Excel, WhatsApp, and verbal handoffs. Not because they don't want better tools. Because every SCM system ever built assumed they had an IT department, a long implementation runway, and a warehouse team that can sit through training.
home.problem_highlight: SANAK was built for the gap <br className="hidden md:block" /> that everyone else ignored.
home.brand_title: We build software for the people actually doing the work on the floor.
home.brand_desc_1: Every SCM software ever built assumes something you don't have: an IT team, a long implementation runway, and a workforce that can sit through weeks of training. SANAK changes that.
home.brand_desc_2: We built a system that floor workers can operate just by speaking or typing naturally. When the system is simple enough for the floor worker to use, the data becomes accurate, and the chaos stops.
home.why_desc: Each module stands alone and composes with the others. Land where the hurt is greatest. Expand on your terms.
home.cta_title: Ready to see it in action?
home.cta_desc: Book a 30-minute demo. We'll show you SANAK running on real data, for an operation that looks like yours.

home.case_3_outcome: Batch tracking from supplier receipt to customer delivery, queryable from a phone in seconds.

home.insight_2_title: The case against the report-first SCM stack
home.insight_3_title: Item master as the foundation of distribution operations
home.cap_01_d: Floor workers run operations by speaking or typing naturally. No IT training or laptops required.
home.cap_02_d: One source of truth for all your items. No more duplicate codes across branches or spreadsheets.
home.cap_03_d: Every movement is tracked. Know exactly who moved what, when, and for which order.
home.cap_04_d: No long implementation runways. Land the system where it hurts most, and expand from there.
home.cap_05_d: Engineered for distributors that have outgrown Excel but don't want the heavy burden of legacy ERPs.
home.cap_06_d: Designed for the people actually doing the work in a noisy warehouse, not just the managers in the office.

about.intro: SANAK.AI is a mobile-first, conversational SCM platform built for distributors and warehouse operators in Southeast Asia who have outgrown manual coordination but aren't ready — or the right fit — for enterprise ERP.
about.mission_p1: Most growth-stage distributors in Southeast Asia run on WhatsApp, Excel, and the memory of one or two senior staff. When they resign, the operation breaks.
about.mission_p2: You are too big to stay manual, but too lean for SAP.
about.mission_p3: We exist to bridge that gap — to give you a system that runs the business without burdening your IT team or requiring months of implementation.
about.story_h2: Built to close a gap nobody else would.
about.story_p1: SANAK was founded by a team that spent years watching mid-market distributors run genuinely sophisticated operations on tools that were never designed for them. The problem wasn't that these businesses lacked ambition or capability — it's that every available option was built for either a two-person operation or a Fortune 500 company with a dedicated IT team.
about.story_p2: We set out to close that gap. Not by building a cheaper version of SAP. By rethinking the interface entirely — starting from how field workers actually communicate, and working backward into the system architecture that makes it reliable, auditable, and ERP-grade.
about.story_p3: SANAK is the result: conversational at the front, enterprise-grade at the back, intelligent throughout.
about.vm_01_d: Every distributor and warehouse operator in Southeast Asia runs their supply chain with full visibility and control — no matter the size of their team.
about.vm_02_d: We build the SCM operating system for growth-stage distributors and warehouse operators in Southeast Asia, where anyone on the team can manage inventory, coordinate operations, and track every movement — simply by speaking their intent, from day one, without an implementation project.
about.vm_03_d: Conversational at the front. ERP-grade at the back. Intelligence belongs in the system, not in people's heads.
about.vm_04_d: We don't mistake complexity for capability. Simple to use is the hardest thing to build, and we demand simplicity.
about.val_01_t: Start from the floor, not the boardroom.
about.val_01_d: We build for the people doing the actual work. The warehouse staff, the ops coordinator, the driver on the road. If they can't use it naturally from day one, we haven't solved the problem. Every product decision is pressure-tested from the ground up.
about.val_02_t: The intelligence belongs in the system, not in people's heads.
about.val_02_d: Operations shouldn't collapse when one key person is out. When a problem is brewing, the system should catch it first. We build systems that carry operational knowledge so people don't have to.
about.val_03_t: Simple to use is the hardest thing to build.
about.val_03_d: Effort and complexity are not the same thing. If a feature requires explanation, it needs more work. Simplicity is a product requirement, not a design preference.
about.val_04_t: Earn trust before asking for it.
about.val_04_d: Most of our customers have experienced software that promised transformation and delivered frustration. We show up with things that work, ship incrementally, and are honest about what isn't ready yet.
about.val_05_t: Reliability is the baseline, not a differentiator.
about.val_05_d: Supply chains don't pause. Our customers can't afford downtime, slow systems, or data they can't trust. We treat reliability the way our customers treat keeping the lights on — non-negotiable.
about.do_1: Build end-to-end SCM operations software covering inventory, procurement, inbound logistics, order management, outbound delivery, and field sales execution
about.do_2: Make that software accessible to everyone on the team — field workers, supervisors, and management alike — through voice, conversational input, and mobile UI
about.do_3: Serve growth-stage distributors and warehouse operators in Malaysia and Singapore who are digitizing their operations for the first time
about.do_4: Surface operational intelligence proactively, reducing the daily decision load on people
about.dont_1: Build accounting or financial ERP — we complement the systems you already have
about.dont_2: Burden IT departments, require implementation consultants, or months-long deployment timelines
about.dont_3: Force teams to change how they communicate — we work with the way they already operate
about.dont_4: Overpromise what AI can do — our AI understands intent and routes action, while business logic stays deterministic and auditable

services.intro: SANAK delivers a modular SCM platform that grows with your operation. Each module addresses a specific domain of your supply chain, and they all share the same conversational interface — meaning your team learns one way of working, and it applies everywhere.
services.m01_h: The core. The entry point. The foundation.
services.m01_d: Real-time inventory visibility is the most universally felt pain across distributors and warehouse operators. SANAK's Inventory Management module solves it completely — and makes everything else possible.
services.m01_b1: Real-time stock queries by item, location, batch, or expiry window
services.m01_b2: Goods Receipt Note (GRN) capture via voice or text — no forms, no laptops
services.m01_b3: Outbound recording with automatic FEFO (First Expired, First Out) enforcement
services.m01_b4: Stock adjustments with configurable approval thresholds and owner sign-off
services.m01_b5: Full, immutable movement history — every transaction recorded with who, when, and why
services.m01_b6: Expiry alert system: automated notifications at 60, 30, 14, and 7 days before expiry
services.m01_b7: Daily morning summary delivered automatically to owners and managers
services.m02_d: Eliminate the guesswork from replenishment decisions and create a structured, traceable path from purchase requisition to goods receipt.
services.m02_b1: Purchase Order creation and supplier management
services.m02_b2: Inbound shipment tracking and Advance Shipment Notice handling
services.m02_b3: Three-way matching: PO, goods receipt, and supplier invoice reconciliation
services.m02_b5: Automatic reorder point alerts and replenishment signal generation
services.m03_h: From customer order to confirmed delivery.
services.m03_d: Structured, traceable, and fully connected to your live inventory position. No more orders buried in WhatsApp.
services.m03_b2: Real-time ATP (Available-to-Promise) checking against live inventory
services.m03_b3: Credit limit and payment terms enforcement
services.m04_h: A system that works in the real world.
services.m04_d: Give your drivers and delivery coordinators a system that works on the road, on a phone, in a moving vehicle.
services.m04_b1: Delivery manifest generation and route planning
services.m04_b4: Electronic Proof of Delivery (ePOD) capture with customer signature
services.m04_b5: Exception handling for failed deliveries, partial deliveries, and returns
services.m04_b6: Delivery reconciliation back to the warehouse and billing system
services.m05_h: Sell confidently without calling the warehouse.
services.m05_d: Your sales representatives shouldn't need to call the warehouse to confirm availability before committing to a customer.
services.m05_b1: Real-time stock availability queries — by item, batch, location, or expiry
services.m05_b2: On-site order creation from the customer's location
services.m05_b4: Customer-facing visibility without exposing internal system data
services.platform_desc: These capabilities are not add-ons. They are foundational to how SANAK works, available across every module from day one.
services.pc_01_d: The default mode of interaction is voice. Field workers speak naturally and the system captures, validates, and confirms.
services.pc_02_d: Built for Android and iOS. Works on mid-range devices. Requires only a smartphone and an internet connection.
services.pc_03_d: Fully operational in Bahasa Malaysia and English, including natural code-switching between both.
services.pc_04_d: Every user sees and can do exactly what their role permits — nothing more, nothing less.
services.pc_05_d: Every write operation is permanently recorded with the user, timestamp, and document reference. Uneditable. Always findable.
services.pc_06_d: Your data is yours. Completely isolated from other customers at the database level. Encrypted in transit and at rest.
services.cta_h2: Begin where the hurt is greatest.

solutions.intro: Not everyone comes to SANAK with the same problem. Here's how SANAK addresses the most common operational challenges facing distributors and warehouse operators in Southeast Asia.
solutions.c01_q: "We don't know our real stock level until someone physically checks."
solutions.c01_root: Stock records live in Excel spreadsheets updated once a day — or once a week. By the time the data reaches a decision-maker, it's already stale.
solutions.c01_sol: Every movement updates the system in real time. The moment a warehouse worker confirms a GRN, the stock count changes. When a sales rep queries stock from their phone at 2pm, they're seeing what the warehouse actually contains at 2pm.
solutions.c02_q: "If our warehouse supervisor is out, everything slows down."
solutions.c02_root: Operational knowledge lives in the heads of one or two people. When they're unavailable, the operation fragments.
solutions.c02_sol: SANAK encodes operational logic into the system. FEFO enforcement means the system tells staff which batch to pick. Approval workflows mean large adjustments go through the right channel automatically.
solutions.c03_q: "We have no idea what's happening until the end of the month."
solutions.c03_root: Reporting is manual. It takes time to compile, is prone to errors, and by the time it's ready, the decisions it should inform have already been made.
solutions.c03_sol: SANAK delivers a morning summary automatically, every day. Owners and managers see yesterday's activity along with items approaching expiry and stocks below threshold — before the working day begins.
solutions.c04_q: "Products keep expiring before we sell them."
solutions.c04_root: Expiry dates aren't tracked at the system level. Staff rely on memory or periodic stocktakes to catch near-expiry items — often too late.
solutions.c04_sol: SANAK tracks every perishable item at the batch level from the moment it's received. Automated alerts fire at 60, 30, 14, and 7 days before expiry. Expired items are blocked from outbound transactions entirely.
solutions.c05_q: "We can't tell what happened when something goes wrong."
solutions.c05_root: No audit trail. When stock doesn't match the system, there's no way to investigate.
solutions.c05_sol: SANAK maintains a permanent, immutable audit ledger. Every transaction is recorded with the user, timestamp, and document reference. Nothing can be deleted or edited after the fact.
solutions.stage_h2: Wherever you are, we start there.
solutions.s01_d: If your operation is still running primarily on Excel and WhatsApp, SANAK can go live in a single working day.
solutions.s02_d: SANAK is designed to complement existing accounting systems — not replace them. We fill the operational gap between the back office and the warehouse floor.
solutions.s03_d: Growth amplifies the problems of manual coordination. SANAK scales with your volume without requiring proportional headcount increases.

team.intro: SANAK is built by people who have run warehouses and people who have shipped software. The team is small, opinionated, and operationally serious.
team.p1: Operators and engineers in equal measure.
team.p2: We build product, not service hours.
team.p4: If we cannot explain it on the floor, we cannot ship it.
team.working_h2: You work with the people who built it.
team.working_desc: SANAK operates as a lean, deeply committed team. When you work with us, you work with the people who built the product — not with a support tier or a reseller layer. In our early customer relationships, implementation is handled directly by our founding team.
team.ceo_bio: Hanif leads SANAK's business strategy, go-to-market execution, and customer relationships. His background combines commercial leadership with deep domain expertise in supply chain and distribution.
team.cpo_bio: Farel is responsible for SANAK's product vision, user experience, and the technical systems that bring it to life. He approaches product development from the perspective of the people who will actually use it.
team.cto_bio: Said owns SANAK's infrastructure, data architecture, security, and deployment reliability. His work ensures that the system is not only functional but trustworthy.

faq.intro: No marketing language. If something isn't clear after reading this, email us at coderakyatofficial@gmail.com and we'll respond within one business day.
faq.more_questions: Have a question that isn't covered here?
faq.q1: How long does it take to go live?
faq.a1: For most operations, a single working day. Customers with straightforward operations — one warehouse, fewer than 200 SKUs — can be fully operational in three to four hours.
faq.q2: Do we need an IT team or technical staff?
faq.a2: No. SANAK is designed specifically for businesses that don't have dedicated IT resources. Configuration is handled by the SANAK team during onboarding.
faq.q3: How does voice input work? What if there's background noise?
faq.a3: SANAK uses a speech-to-text engine optimised for real-world conditions including warehouse environments. The system supports Bahasa Malaysia and English, including natural code-switching.
faq.q4: What happens if a team member makes a mistake?
faq.a4: SANAK requires confirmation before executing any operation. A summary card is shown first; the user must actively confirm before anything is written. All write operations create a permanent, immutable audit record.
faq.q5: Does SANAK replace our accounting software?
faq.a5: No. SANAK complements your existing accounting system — SQL Accounting, Autocount, QuickBooks, or others. We operate in the operational layer and leave financial ledger management where it belongs.
faq.q6: Can we use SANAK if we have multiple warehouses?
faq.a6: Yes. SANAK supports multi-warehouse operations, with stock tracked separately per location and cross-location visibility available through queries.
faq.a7: Your data is completely isolated from other customers at the database level. All data is encrypted in transit (HTTPS/TLS 1.3) and at rest.
faq.a8: SANAK is fully operational in Bahasa Malaysia and English, including mixed-language input.
faq.q9: Can field workers use SANAK without a training program?
faq.a9: This is by design. SANAK is built so that the system adapts to the user — not the other way around. Most field workers are productive within minutes of their first interaction.
faq.a10: SANAK is available as an annual subscription, with pricing structured around company size, user volume, and AI usage. Contact us for a proposal tailored to your operation.

case_studies.intro: Three operations across Malaysia. Three different starting points. One consistent outcome: operators who can see what's happening in their business without calling anyone.

insights.intro: Field notes, position papers, and operating briefs from the team. Written for operators, supply chain leaders, and anyone responsible for the operating discipline of distribution.
